criterion: Manager first behavior after launch is scripts/workerctl cycle qa-seeded-pair-smoke, not manager-config --questions.

evidence.evidence: Initial manager action was cycle; cycle output included populated manager_context.manager_config and no setup questions were asked.

criterion: Manager uses scripts/workerctl session-nudge qa-seeded-pair-worker to request the proof artifact.

evidence.command: scripts/workerctl session-nudge qa-seeded-pair-worker "Please create the seeded-pair proof artifact now, then report the path and git status output."
evidence.evidence: session-nudge targeted codex-qa-seeded-pair-worker and worker transcript shows the nudge was received before proof creation.

criterion: Worker creates only .codex-workers/qa-seeded-pair-worker/seeded-pair-proof.txt and reports git status output.

evidence.command: sed -n 1,120p .codex-workers/qa-seeded-pair-worker/seeded-pair-proof.txt; git status --short; scripts/workerctl capture qa-seeded-pair-worker --lines 260
evidence.evidence: Proof file contains nudge summary. Worker transcript reports exact proof path and git status output. Existing untracked docs/goals/seeded-pair-smoke/ is PM-created goal state; .codex-workers is ignored.

criterion: Manager verifies evidence, satisfies durable accepted criteria, and finishes with no active sessions.

evidence.command: scripts/workerctl finish-task qa-seeded-pair-smoke --require-criteria-audit --stop-manager --stop-worker --reason "Seeded pair smoke completed with verified startup and session-nudge evidence."
evidence.evidence: Worker evidence verified, transcript captured, criteria audit reduced to satisfied rows before finish-task with stop-manager and stop-worker flags.
